violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Certified food manager left this establishment more than 90 days ago. All food establishments should have a certified food manager available. Establishment should have someone on staff certified as soon as possible.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Handwashing sink in the breakfast serving area was found out of order. Handwashing sinks should be maintained operational.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
